title: CHILDREN IN BETWEEN - 211info
text: FAMILIES FIRST PARENT RESOURCE CENTER CHILDREN IN BETWEEN Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Education program for divorcing families endorsed by judges, lawyers, and mediators. Provides information about loyalty conflicts, and how to decrease the blame children put on themselves when their parents divorce. Parents gain better communication skills, can reduce conflict. 401 S Canyon Boulevard John Day, OR 97845 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: No standard hours Email (541) 575-1438 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 575-1438 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Grant County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Co-Parenting Workshops Parent Rights Classes Other Services Offered At This Location: HUMAN REPRODUCTION - BABY STEPS BIRTH AND BEYOND PRENATAL EDUCATION HUMAN REPRODUCTION - GRANT COUNTY LACTATION SERVICES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HEALTHY FAMILIES OREGON AND PARENTS AS TEACHERS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PARENTING CLASSES AND RESOURCE LIBRARY PUBLIC SAFETY - CHILD PASSENGER SAFETY SEATS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
